---
title: "gitpractice"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(here)
library(tidyverse)

# read in data
p301 = read_csv(here("Week2", "p301.csv"))

# aggregate by water year
p301_yearly <- p301 %>%
  group_by(wy) %>%
  summarise(total_streamflow = sum(streamflow),
            total_precip = sum(precip),
            percent_streamflow = (total_streamflow / total_precip) * 100)

# calculate mean, range and standard deviation of percent streamflow across...
mean(p301_yearly$percent_streamflow) # [1] 25.50839
range(p301_yearly$percent_streamflow) # [1]  0.00000 59.61193
sd(p301_yearly$percent_streamflow) # [1] 18.96631
```

This is a change Nathan made, committed, and pushed.
